name: Festive Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream together the softened cream cheese, packed brown sugar, ground cinnamon, ground ginger, salt, and ground cloves until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on medium speed.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in the mashed pumpkin, milk, and vanilla extract.
3. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C). Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until a knife inserted halfway between the edge and center comes out clean. Cool slightly on a wire rack.
5. In a separate bowl, blend together the sour cream and sugar until smooth.
6. Spread the blended mixture over the warm pie.
7. Return the pie to the oven and bake for an additional 3 to 5 minutes or until the topping is set. Cool on a wire rack.
8. Cover and refrigerate before serving.
